faelle.skeptic_begruendung: Generic new-user inflow can mimic concentrated activity; new wallets are not evidence of informed trading. If flow is two-sided / bidirectional, it is a market-making or hedging pattern rather than a directional informed bet. The cue may be a BUY-only filter artifact; without exit/position data it is not a directional signal.
